c.d: Capability of the app to compare prices from multiple stores or websites for the same product to find the best deal
Availability of coupons, discount codes, or daily deals provided within the app for various products
Ability to set alerts for price drops or deals on specific items
Presence of user ratings and reviews to assess trustworthiness and deal quality
Range of product categories covered by the app for deal searching and price comparison
Platforms supported by the app such as iOS, Android, or web
Support for finding deals or discounts from local stores or marketplaces
